channel.title: Series on Keqi's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Series on Keqi's blog

item.title: LeetGPU刷题系列
item.author: plloningye@gmail.com (Keqi Ye)
item.description:
This series will systematically record my problem-solving journey on the LeetGPU platform, focusing on solution approaches and performance optimization strategies for each problem.

Series Content

LeetGPU is an algorithm practice platform similar to LeetCode, but focused on CUDA/GPU programming. From basic vector operations to complex parallel algorithm optimization, each article will deeply analyze the core solution.

Update Plan

  • Basic Operations: Vector addition, matrix operations, etc.
  • Memory Optimization: Global memory access patterns, constant memory
  • Parallel Algorithms: Parallel reduction, scan, sort, etc.
  • Advanced Optimization: Occupancy, Stream, Multi-GPU, etc.

Prerequisites

Readers should have a basic understanding of CUDA programming:

  • Writing CUDA kernels
  • Thread hierarchy (Grid/Block/Thread)
  • Memory allocation and management
